title: DSOVS Control
description: Machine-readable source of truth for a single OWASP DevSecOps Verification Standard (DSOVS) control. The Markdown documents, the JSON API and the spreadsheet are all generated from these files, so this YAML - not the Markdown - is authoritative.

title.description: Human-readable control title, e.g. 'Container Security Scanning'.

phase.description: Semantic SDLC phase. Design controls are rendered under the Requirements section of the Table of Contents to match the published structure.

slug.description: Markdown filename stem under document/, without extension, e.g. CODE-008-Container-Security-Scanning.

status.description: Authoring status. 'complete' renders as a tick in the Table of Contents; 'draft' renders as the construction marker.

type.description: Control character. 'tool' controls render a Notable Tools section; 'process' controls render a Further reading section.

summary.description: Control summary as Markdown prose. Paragraphs are separated by blank lines.

levels.description: The four maturity levels, in order 0 to 3.

title.description: Level heading text, rendered after 'Level N - '. Must match the existing document verbatim.

evidence.description: Verification evidence an assessor can collect to confirm this level is met. Authoring guidance: 2-4 concrete, checkable items (artefacts, configuration, pipeline output, interview questions). May be empty for Level 0.

diagram.description: Optional Mermaid diagram BODY only (no ```mermaid fences - the generator adds them), e.g. 'graph LR; A-- step -->B;'. null or omitted when the level has no diagram.

integrations.description: CI/CD usage examples for this tool.

label.description: Display label, e.g. 'GitHub Actions'. Defaults are derived from platform when omitted.

icon.description: Icon filename under document/images, e.g. github.svg. Derived from platform when omitted.

link.description: Optional href for the integration heading.

code.description: Verbatim code/config sample. Rendered inside a fenced block.

further_reading.description: Authoritative references for process-type controls (and optionally tool-type).

mappings.description: Cross-references to other frameworks. Best-effort; arrays may be empty or omitted.
